response.justification: Candidate brings deep, decades-long software engineering experience, open-source leadership through GISCollective, and strong Linux/Unix exposure, which aligns well with parts of the role. However, the job lists German at minimum C1 as a hard requirement and the resume states only basic German, which is disqualifying for a client-facing leadership role in a German-speaking market. Additional gaps include no explicit Python, no UML proficiency, and limited evidence of formal team leadership or executive-level project management, which are core to the Head of Development position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and AI tooling
Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating architecture and product ownership
Strong teaching/workshop background indicating mentoring capability
concerns: German language only at basic level, below the required C1 minimum
No mention of Python or UML, both listed as desired/required skills
Limited explicit evidence of leading interdisciplinary teams or executive-level delivery oversight
